'''Koris Haslam''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and the leader of a [[Commando/Legends|commando]] group serving within the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. His impressive reputation as a commando was known throughout the Rebellion's military.

==Biography==
Among the missions Haslam participated in was the [[Mission to Selnesh|rescue]] of [[Gebnerret Vibrion]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] prison located on [[Selnesh/Legends|Selnesh]]. The team that he led into the prison consisted of himself, [[Melenna Seltrayne]], [[Gowan Ch'lessan]], [[Liak]], [[Barsoulentinial Enkhet]], and [[Doctor/Legends|Dr.]] [[Aurin Leith]]. He had misgivings, however, about the inclusion of Dr. Leith, who objected to the possibility of having to kill Vibrion rather than allow him to be interrogated, even suggesting that the team would be better off with a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] with modified programming. Despite this, Haslam and his team were able to rescue Vibrion from the Empire, although he was slightly injured in the process during a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] ambush. During the team's escape from Selnesh, Haslam manned the transport's defensive [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].
